title: Jaishankar Meets Xi Jinping, Discusses India-China Ties
description: The external affairs minister landed in China on Monday on a two-day visit to attend a conclave of the Shanghai Cooperation Organisation (SCO)
keywords: EAM S Jaishankar, Xi Jinping, India-China relations, SCO meeting
